description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The individual is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve top and matching pants, both appearing to be made from a single, unadorned fabric. The face is rounded with short hair, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The shoes are simple and blend seamlessly with the rest of the outfit, suggesting a utilitarian or casual style. The overall appearance is realistic, with subtle anatomical details visible in the limbs and torso. There are no visible accessories or carried objects, and the clothing lacks any prominent features such as logos, pockets, or fasteners.
description: A stocky adult male in a fitted, long-sleeve top and pants, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has short hair and simple shoes, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, chest, and outstretched arms, with clear visibility of the torso and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and leg, with the body’s depth and posture evident.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with the arms extended and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, mirroring the left side with similar posture and proportions.
